title: llama-herd config
description: The herd roster. Each role maps to a model + tuned system prompt + Ollama options.

maxParallelTasks.description: Max independent tasks accepted in one delegate_batch call. Defaults to 3 if omitted; raise it on beefier hardware.

ollamaHost.description: Base URL of the Ollama server. Defaults to the local instance if omitted. If you point this at a non-local host, also loosen the --allow-net flag in deno.json.

roles.description: Role name -> preset. Role names appear as an enum in the MCP tool schema, so keep them short and task-oriented.

model.description: Ollama model tag, e.g. "llama3.2:3b". Must already be pulled (`ollama pull <model>`).

description.description: Shown to Claude as the role's enum description — keep it short and task-oriented.

system.description: System prompt tuned for this role.

options.description: Ollama request options, e.g. num_ctx, temperature.

format.description: Optional JSON schema passed to Ollama's `format` for structured output.

think.description: Disable/enable reasoning on hybrid-thinking models (e.g. qwen3.6). Omit for models that don't support the flag.
